overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a rainy, foggy night in a historic New Orleans-inspired city (Saint Denis). The character moves from a covered market courtyard with string lights, through a stone archway, down cobblestone streets with tram tracks, and into a town square with horse-drawn carriages.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market courtyard with string lights and central fountain

events.description: passing through stone archway from covered market area to open cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rainy market courtyard toward the illuminated stone archway

entered.detail: overhead strings of warm yellow lights spanning the courtyard
large stone fountain with sculptural figure on pedestal
wooden vendor stall with canvas awning
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
large stone passage connecting courtyard to street beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rainy, lamp-lit market courtyard decorated with overhead string lights. A stone fountain stands to the right while wooden stalls line the left. The character approaches and passes through a large stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed courtyard to the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic cobblestone street with tram tracks and gas lamps

events.description: exited archway into open cobblestone street with visible tram tracks
slight left turn following the curve of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet cobblestone street past historic buildings with iron balconies and tram tracks

entered.detail: metal tram rails embedded in the cobblestone street surface
multi-story brick buildings with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows
row of historic structures with covered balconies and storefronts
hanging sign for pharmacy visible on left building facade
ornate cast iron gas lamps illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the character walks down a long cobblestone street lined with historic buildings featuring wrought iron balconies. Tram tracks run down the center of the wet street, reflecting the warm glow of gas lamps. The character follows the gentle curve of the street past various storefronts including a pharmacy.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with trees and horse traffic

events.description: entering open town square with park area and trees visible on the left
passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square, passing a parked carriage and approaching a horse rider

notable_agents.action: black horse-drawn carriage parked stationary on the street side
rider on horseback moving through the square ahead

entered.detail: large leafy trees in the park area adjacent to the square
ornate black iron fence bordering the park area
gazebo structure visible in the center of the square

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open town square where the street widens and trees become visible on the left behind an iron fence. The rain continues to fall as the character passes a stationary horse-drawn carriage on the right and approaches a rider on horseback in the center of the square. Historic buildings continue to line the right side while the left opens to parkland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed, lamp-lit market courtyard into the expansive, rain-slicked streets of a historic city. It begins with the character walking past wooden stalls and a stone fountain under overhead string lights, moving steadily toward a large stone archway. As the character passes through the arch, the scene opens onto a long cobblestone street where the warm glow of gas lamps reflects off wet tram tracks and wrought iron balconies. The camera then follows the gentle curve of the road past various storefronts before the environment widens into an open town square. Finally, the street expands further to reveal parkland behind an iron fence on the left, passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage as the character approaches a rider on horseback.
